name: C J's Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: No M&A or material news found; active small contractor operating from 277 Harding Hwy, Elmer/Pittsgrove NJ.
fit_notes: Small independent family-run NJ contractor in South Jersey (Salem County); plausible tuck-in for Summit's NJ footprint, but limited public data and email domain (geturbuslicense.com) suggests very small operation — diligence needed on fleet and contracts.

name: Kinder Glide Inc
owner_or_parent: Children's Center of Monmouth County (NJ nonprofit special-needs school)
districts_or_customers: Children's Center of Monmouth County (in-house captive transport for autism/developmental-disability students ages 3-21)
recent_news: Operates as the captive transportation arm of Children's Center of Monmouth County, a NJ DOE-approved private special-needs school at 1115 Green Grove Rd, Neptune — same address as Kinder Glide.
fit_notes: NOT an independent tuck-in target — Kinder Glide is the in-house transportation operation of a nonprofit private school (Children's Center of Monmouth County) serving its own students. Unlikely standalone acquisition candidate; only relevant if Summit pursued an outsourcing/contracting partnership.

name: Community Bus Svc Corner
owner_or_parent: independent (Community Bus Services, Inc.; privately held)
districts_or_customers: plus districts/agencies across Ashtabula, Cuyahoga, Franklin, Geauga, Lake, Licking, Mahoning, Montgomery, Trumbull counties
recent_news: Multi-location Ohio contractor since 1933; ~4M annual student trips, ~3M bus miles, 100K special-needs trips per year. No acquisition by Beacon/First Student/etc. found.
fit_notes: Attractive larger Ohio platform-scale operator (10 facilities, 9 counties, special-needs capability, 90+ year heritage) — likely bigger than typical tuck-in (parent entity is 201-500 employees). Warren location is one of several; acquisition would be at the corporate level. Strong fit for Summit Ohio expansion if independent owners are willing sellers.

name: Gentry School Bus Line
owner_or_parent: Olympus Car and Coach / KTG Bus of Tennessee (acquired 2019)
principals: Patrick Healy (Co-owner/COO, Olympus Car and Coach / KTG)
recent_news: Acquired by Olympus Car and Coach in 2019 from the Gentry family; now operates as KTG Bus of Tennessee. August 2024 ribbon-cutting on new North Knoxville facility (2650 Western Ave).
fit_notes: NOT an independent tuck-in — acquired 2019 by Olympus Car and Coach (Patrick Healy) and rebranded KTG Bus of Tennessee. Now part of a growing regional Knoxville-area strategic owner; would only be reachable as a corporate-level acquisition of KTG/Olympus, not a family tuck-in.

name: ICC West Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: No public web presence or news found for 'ICC West Inc' as a California school-bus operator. Listed address (4712 Admiralty Way PMB 1110, Marina Del Rey) is a UPS Store / private mailbox address — not an operating bus yard, indicating possibly a shell or holding entity rather than an active operator.
fit_notes: Likely NOT a viable tuck-in — no evidence of an operating school-bus fleet under this name; PMB mailbox address and absence of any web/news footprint suggest a shell entity, holding company, or mis-classified record. Recommend deprioritizing pending CA Secretary of State filing review.
